game_name: Dragon Quest VI: Realms of Revelation

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this RPG

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Combat
special_mechanics.description: Traditional turn-based RPG battle system in first-person perspective with random encounters

special_mechanics.name: Class System
special_mechanics.description: Characters can switch between classes at Alltrades Abbey; class levels gained through battles (separate from character experience levels)

special_mechanics.name: Wagon System
special_mechanics.description: Allows character swapping on world map during overworld exploration

special_mechanics.name: Dual World Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Game features Real World and Dream World with separate but similar maps; player can transition between worlds

tier_notes: Tier 2 (Empirical/Qualitative): Dragon Quest VI is a turn-based RPG with overhead perspective exploration. No physics parameters for character movement are documented in available sources. The game focuses on turn-based combat rather than real-time physics. Sources provided contain game overview, speedrun leaderboards, and Wikipedia article describing gameplay mechanics and story, but no technical movement or physics data.
sources_used: wikipedia - Dragon Quest VI gameplay section
